about.heading: A gear-obsessed producer treating rhythm as medicine.
bodyParagraphs: Guy DeGiacinto is a producer, DJ and live streamer working at the intersection of techno, tribal and Latin electronic music. After years touring and performing live sets, he now builds tracks from the ground up — treating the TR-8S as a production instrument, not just a jam machine.

Operating under the BPM-THERAPY and Unmarked banners, he streams four nights a week from a Mac Studio-driven rig, sharing the entire process: MIDI routing, FX racks, harmonic mixing on the Camelot wheel, and the occasional glorious failure.

contact.heading: Let's build something.
contact.body: Bookings, collaborations, lessons or gear questions — drop a line below.
contact.formNote: Connect a form provider (e.g. Formspree, Netlify Forms) or set the form action to route inquiries to your email.
